settings.cellContentFunction: let color = '#757575'; let backColor = '#F5F5F5'; let text = value; if (value === 'pending') { color = '#FFA000'; backColor = '#FFF8E1'; } else if (value === 'confirmed') { color = '#1976D2'; backColor = '#E3F2FD'; } else if (value === 'active') { color = '#388E3C'; backColor = '#E8F5E9'; } else if (value === 'completed') { color = '#7B1FA2'; backColor = '#F3E5F5'; } return `${text}`;

settings.markdownTextPattern:
Reservation Summary
Employee ID${Employee ID}
Space ID${Space ID}
License Plate${License Plate}
Status${Status}

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number') { if (value >= 90) return '#F44336'; if (value >= 70) return '#FF9800'; return '#4CAF50'; } return '#607D8B';

config.title: Booking Status
Booking Start Time

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number' && value >= 90) { return '#F44336'; } else if (value >= 70) { return '#FF9800'; } else { return '#4CAF50'; }

additionalInfo.description: Employee dashboard for checking real-time garage availability and managing personal parking reservations.
